- [ ] `chore` — Build process, dependencies, tooling
- [ ] `style` — Formatting / linting only

## Checklist

<!-- Make sure all boxes are checked before requesting a review. -->

- [ ] My branch is up to date with `develop`
- [ ] Code follows the project's style guide (`black` / `ruff` for backend, ESLint for frontend)
- [ ] All existing tests pass (`pytest` / `npm run test`)
- [ ] I have added tests for new functionality
- [ ] I have updated the documentation if needed (README, docstrings, comments)
- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or `.env` files are included in this PR
- [ ] This PR does **not** introduce breaking changes
